description: You are a Logistics Coordinator at Great Lakes Intermodal Transport. Create a formal Master Bill of Lading (BOL) package for a multi-stop LTL shipment using the data in /home/ga/Documents/shipment_data.json. Using Apache OpenOffice Writer, produce a professional documentation package that includes a title with the BOL number, an auto-generated Table of Contents, and page numbers in the footer. The document must contain sections for Shipper/Carrier Info, Cargo Manifest, Delivery Schedule, Hazmat Declaration, and Certifications formatted with 'Heading 1' and 'Heading 2' styles. Include tables for the cargo manifest, delivery schedule, and hazmat items. Save the final document as /home/ga/Documents/GLI_BOL_2024_03847.odt. Login: username ga, no password required.
